annexes.title: List of Union Harmonisation Legislation
annexes.description: Lists existing EU product safety laws (machinery, toys, medical devices, radio equipment, pressure equipment, motor vehicles, aviation, rail, marine equipment). AI systems that are safety components of these products are automatically high-risk.

annexes.title: List of Criminal Offences
annexes.description: Lists serious criminal offences (terrorism, trafficking, sexual exploitation, murder, kidnapping) for which the narrow law-enforcement exception to real-time remote biometric identification may apply.

annexes.title: High-Risk AI Systems
annexes.description: Eight categories of standalone high-risk AI systems: biometrics, critical infrastructure, education, employment, essential services, law enforcement, migration, and administration of justice.
categories: Employment, workers management and access to self-employment
Access to essential private and public services and benefits
Migration, asylum and border control management
Administration of justice and democratic processes

annexes.title: Technical Documentation
annexes.description: Mandatory content for high-risk AI system technical documentation: general description, development process, system architecture, training data, risk management, accuracy metrics, cybersecurity measures, post-market monitoring plan.

annexes.title: EU Declaration of Conformity
annexes.description: Standardised template for the EU Declaration of Conformity that providers must sign before affixing CE marking.

annexes.title: Conformity Assessment — Internal Control
annexes.description: Self-assessment conformity route where the provider internally verifies compliance without third-party involvement. Applicable for most high-risk AI systems.

annexes.title: Conformity Assessment — Quality Management System and Technical Documentation
annexes.description: Third-party (notified body) conformity route required for real-time/post remote biometric identification systems. Includes QMS audit and technical documentation review.

annexes.title: Registration Information for High-Risk AI Systems
annexes.description: Data fields for registering high-risk AI systems in the EU database: provider identity, system name, description, purpose, conformity status, CE mark.

annexes.title: Registration Information for Real-World Testing
annexes.description: Data fields for registering real-world testing plans: provider identity, geographic scope, test subjects, data protection measures, duration, scientific justification.

annexes.title: Union Legislative Acts on Large-Scale IT Systems
annexes.description: References EU laws on large-scale border/security IT systems (SIS, Eurodac, VIS, EES, ETIAS, ECRIS-TCN). AI components of these systems are classified as high-risk.

annexes.title: Technical Documentation for GPAI Models
annexes.description: Technical documentation requirements for all GPAI model providers: general description, training data sources, compute (FLOPs), capabilities, limitations, safety testing, energy consumption.

annexes.title: Transparency Information for GPAI Downstream Providers
annexes.description: Information GPAI providers must share with downstream integrators: model architecture, intended uses, known limitations, API documentation, usage policies.

annexes.title: Criteria for GPAI Models with Systemic Risk
annexes.description: Criteria for designating GPAI models as systemic risk beyond the 10^25 FLOPs threshold: user reach, degree of autonomy, harm potential, multimodality, cyberattack capability.
